summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Web3 Scam Detector app. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for landing page, wallet results, token results, navigation, and recent scans. The app correctly analyzes Solana wallets and tokens with deterministic risk scoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (server.py, solana_service.py, scoring.py)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Proper error handling for RPC failures with 502 responses
Cache TTL of 5 minutes working correctly
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test scans created during testing are stored in MongoDB analyses collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: /api/health, /api/analyze (wallet & token auto-detection), /api/analyze-wallet, /api/analyze-token, /api/recent-scans, /api/trusted-programs. Frontend landing page, results page (wallet & token views), navigation, demo links, and recent scans all functional. Risk scoring: Jupiter wallet=90 (Safe), USDC token=45 (High Risk due to mint/freeze authority active). Cache hit working on repeated requests.

backend: POST /api/analyze with wallet address - returns type=wallet, score 0-100, reasons, insights
POST /api/analyze with token mint - returns type=token, insights with mintAuthorityActive/freezeAuthorityActive
GET /api/recent-scans - returns array of recent analyses
GET /api/trusted-programs - returns list of known programs
Result caching - same address returns cached=true within 5 min
frontend: Landing page - hero, wallet input form, demo-address links, recent scans section
WalletInput - invalid address shows inline error, valid address navigates to /scan/:address
Results page - loading state, RiskScoreMeter animates, RiskBreakdownList renders reasons
WarningBanner shows correct verdict based on risk level
TokenInfo renders for token type with mint/freeze authority status
Copy address button, Solscan link, Re-scan button all functional
Navigation - Back button returns to landing, demo address links work
